tasks.subject: Task 1: Create LogoAnimation.astro component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the self-contained canvas animation component with topology algorithm, theme-aware colors, visibility pausing, and SPA cleanup.

**Files:**
- Create: `docs/src/components/LogoAnimation.astro`
- Reference: `/home/sini/foo-wip.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Canvas renders at 400x400
- Animation cycles infinitely
- Colors from CSS vars, theme toggle updates via MutationObserver
- IntersectionObserver pauses when off-screen
- astro:before-swap cleanup
- No "den" text overlay
- Correct sizing styles for hero slot

**Verify:** Visual inspection — import in index.mdx body, run docs dev server

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create Hero.astro override
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Override Starlight's Hero component to render LogoAnimation on the index page, preserving all other hero behavior.

**Files:**
- Create: `docs/src/components/Hero.astro`
- Reference: `docs/node_modules/@astrojs/starlight/components/Hero.astro`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Index page renders LogoAnimation in image slot
- Non-index pages with hero images render correctly
- All hero markup preserved
- All hero styles preserved

**Verify:** Visual inspection — index shows animation, other pages unchanged

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire config and clean up index.mdx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register Hero override in astro.config.mjs and remove static image from index.mdx.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/astro.config.mjs`
- Modify: `docs/src/content/docs/index.mdx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- astro.config.mjs has Hero override
- index.mdx has no hero.image section
- Docs site builds without errors
- Landing page shows animation in hero slot
- Other doc pages render normally

**Verify:** `cd docs && npm run build` succeeds
